title: 8 New England beach towns are among the best on the East Coast, according to Conde Nast Traveler
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Conde Nast Traveler lists eight New England beach towns in its top 20 East Coast destinations.
Massachusetts' Oak Bluffs, Nantucket, and Rockport were highlighted for their unique attractions and scenic beauty.
Bar Harbor, Kennebunkport, Newport, Hampton Beach, and Madison were also featured for their coastal charm.

title: His truck was stolen from a Logan Airport garage. Massport initially refused a parking refund.
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Brendon Byrnes's truck was stolen from Logan Airport's central garage during his vacation in March.
Massport initially refused Byrnes's $276 parking refund, citing unspecified circumstances, but reversed the decision after media involvement.
Byrnes's truck was caught on camera leaving the garage, but he has little hope of recovering the vehicle.

title: Patriots rookie Quintayvious Hutchins charged with assault and battery
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Patriots rookie Quintayvious Hutchins arraigned for assault and battery on a family member; pleads not guilty.
Hutchins, a 6-foot-3 linebacker from Boston College, was a seventh-round NFL draft pick last month.
The Patriots are gathering information and have refrained from commenting further on Hutchins' legal case.

title: Man pleads guilty to opening emergency exit door on flight from Boston
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Angel Luis Morales Torres pleaded guilty to opening an emergency exit door on a JetBlue flight at Logan Airport.
The incident on Jan. 7, 2025, involved deploying the inflatable slide, halting the flight from Boston to Puerto Rico.
Morales faces up to 20 years in prison, three years supervised release, and a fine up to $250,000.

title: Boston travel influencer quarantined in Nebraska after time on hantavirus-hit ship
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Boston influencer Jake Rosmarin quarantined in Nebraska after hantavirus outbreak on wildlife cruise.
Rosmarin among 15 Americans at University of Nebraska Medical Center; one tested positive, asymptomatic.
Hantavirus incubation requires 42-day isolation; virus spreads via rodents, rare human transmission possible.

title: Mass. man facing up to life in prison after allegedly kidnapping and torturing N.H. woman
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Tyron Harris, 27, of Massachusetts, and Damarcus Bonner, 30, of Connecticut, face life in prison for a kidnapping conspiracy.
Authorities allege the victim was kidnapped in Claremont, N.H., tortured in Vermont, and held for ransom over theft accusations.
Law enforcement discovered a silver handgun and illegal drugs at the scene; the victim was found bound with burns and other injuries.

title: Patriots will play Lions in Germany during 2026 season
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Patriots to play Lions in Munich, Germany on Nov. 15, 2026, as part of NFL's international games.
The Week 10 matchup will be held at Allianz Arena; Patriots are considered the away team.
This will be the Patriots' second regular season game in Germany, following a 2023 game against the Colts.

title: Lighthouse among Gillette Stadium attractions to be closed during World Cup
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Gillette Stadium lighthouse and Patriots Hall of Fame will close from May 14 to July for World Cup.
Patriots ProShop will relocate to South Marketplace during World Cup, open daily from 10 a.m. to 6 p.m.
Fans can attend FIFA Fan Festival at City Hall Plaza and enjoy transportation options for World Cup games.

title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (May 13)
author: The Boston Globe
bullets: A Colonial-style home at 96 Newtown Road, Acton, sold for $1.79 million; built in 2021 with 4 bedrooms.
In Arlington, a Colonial home at 69 Edmund Road, built in 1933 with 6 bedrooms, sold for $2.15 million.
A high-rise condo at 1 Dalton St. #2703, Boston, built in 2015, sold for $4.9 million, featuring 2 bedrooms.

title: North Adams man convicted, sentenced for murdering his wife in 2022
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Luis Rosado, 53, was convicted of first-degree murder for fatally stabbing his wife, Jillian Tatro, in 2022.
Rosado was sentenced to life in prison without parole for the murder committed in Tatro's North Adams apartment.
The victim was found with multiple stab and slash wounds; Rosado was identified as a suspect through cell phone data.
